views.system.config.title: System Configuration
views.system.config.subtitle: Manage runtime parameters and site settings.
views.system.config.noPermission: You do not have permission to access this page
views.system.gachaConfig.title: Gacha Configuration
views.system.createConfig.title: Create Configuration
views.system.createConfig.desc: Enter the name, description, key, and value to create a new system config entry.
views.system.createConfig.name: Name
views.system.createConfig.errNameMax: Name must be at most 20 characters
views.system.createConfig.errDescription: Description must be at most 100 characters
views.system.createConfig.errKeyMax: Key must be at most 20 characters
views.system.createConfig.errKeyFormat: Key may only contain lowercase letters and dots, and cannot start or end with a dot
views.system.createConfig.errValueMax: Value must be at most 128 characters
